raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A wooden cutting board with green garlic stalks is on a wooden table. A chef's knife is on a wooden stand to the right. The garlic stalks are rigid and need to be cut. STRATEGY - First, grasp the garlic stalks to move them to the cutting board. Then, grasp the knife to chop the garlic. Failure modes include dropping the garlic or knife, or misaligning the knife for chopping. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the garlic stalks on the cutting board; Step 2 grasp the garlic stalks for transport; Step 3 transport to the cutting board (if needed); Step 4 grasp the knife; Step 5 chop the garlic stalks.**
Goal: chopped(green_garlic)
Scene: green_garlic, chef_knife, cutting_board, table
Step 1: reach(green_garlic)
  affordance_region: the green garlic stalks on the cutting board
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_garlic, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_garlic) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_garlic)
  affordance_region: the green garlic stalks on the cutting board
  contact: holding(green_garlic) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_garlic)
Step 3: transport(green_garlic -> cutting_board)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the cutting board
  spatial: above(green_garlic, cutting_board, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_garlic)
  done_when: above(green_garlic, cutting_board, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_garlic -> cutting_board)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the cutting board
  contact: surface_contact(green_garlic, cutting_board) [completion]; released(green_garlic) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_garlic) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_garlic, cutting_board) AND released(green_garlic)
Step 5: reach(chef_knife)
  affordance_region: the chef's knife on the wooden stand
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, chef_knife, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, chef_knife) < 0.03
Step 6: grasp(chef_knife)
  affordance_region: the handle of the chef's knife
  contact: holding(chef_knife) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(chef_knife)
Step 7: chop(green_garlic)
  affordance_region: the green garlic stalks on the cutting board
  contact: knife_contact(chef_knife, green_garlic) [completion]; released(chef_knife) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_garlic) [completion]
  done_when: knife_contact(chef_knife, green_garlic) AND released(chef_knife)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the green garlic stalks on the cutting board
the green garlic stalks on the cutting board
an empty area on the cutting board
an empty area on the cutting board
the chef's knife on the wooden stand
the handle of the chef's knife
the green garlic stalks on the cutting board
